title: 烟囱别墅之谜
source_file: data\raw\detectiveqa\novel_data_en\142-烟囱别墅之谜-阿加莎克里斯蒂.txt
summary:
George Romax and others discover the body of a woman holding a gun. Anthony identifies her as Miss White, though he clarifies she was actually an actress impersonating the real Miss White, who had been kidnapped. Anthony explains that this imposter had been hiding for years following a revolution and a reported murder at a palace. Her motive was to find a diamond; she had killed Prince Michael after he accidentally recognized her. To deflect suspicion, she had previously placed a gun in Eisakstan's suitcase and returned letters to mislead investigators.

The Baron reacts with shock to the woman's identity, claiming she was supposed to be dead, and later whispers a secret to George Romax that leaves George visibly shaken. Amidst the confusion, Anthony reveals that a man claiming to be LeMon is actually a French secret agent. Simultaneously, Hiram Fisk intercepts the real LeMon, stating he has been waiting to arrest him.

Anthony later explains his strategy: he used the suspicion surrounding Prince Victor and the identity of the "King of Viktor" to manipulate the situation. He intentionally fed information regarding jewels and "the row of things" to LeMon to confuse him and his accomplices. Anthony explains that while LeMon was busy accusing him of being the King to distract everyone in the room, a note was delivered to Miss White and the gem was stolen. George Romax criticizes Anthony's reckless methods, noting that the plan nearly resulted in the loss of a national treasure.
